title: epilobium palustre var. simplex
intro: Epilobium palustre var. simplex, also known as marsh willowherb, is a perennial plant belonging to the Onagraceae family, commonly found in wetlands and marshy areas. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Epilobium palustre var. simplex include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues. Additionally, the plant's leaves and stems are rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, making it a valuable herbal remedy for promoting overall well-being.
